Since each row contains a throw's distance in meters along with the year it was recorded, we need to group by the "year" column to analyze the distances for each year. Since the data contains numerical values representing meters, we can compare these values directly to determine which year had a longer throw.
In 2008, the throws totaled 142.40 m (71.00 m + 71.40 m). In 2009, the throws totaled 218.09 m (72.85 m + 74.79 m + 70.45 m). Therefore, she threw more meters in 2009.
